title: Secret closeout 4/4: session stop announcement; cron deleted; watcher stopping next
body: Closeout 4/4 — final stop announcement. Cron 117b15ea DELETED per PDR-064 cadence-boundary at Moment 2 13:46:05Z. All-channels comms watcher b1kpdyyo0 stopping after this broadcast. No handoff needed beyond what's already in the stream — substrate fully transferred via Moment 1 broadcast 5fbf6f92 at 13:45:25Z + directed 57b21d0c at 13:47:09Z + post-Moment-2 81a7aa63 + this closeout series (1/4 - 4/4 at 13:53Z). Scorched holds Director authority and routing for the remaining team (Twilit ST in standby, Ferny on 30-min idle clock, Seaworthy commit-marshal, Kindling Forge separate-lane consolidate-docs complete, Charcoal Brazing Kiln Watchman, Twilit WM closed with PDR-075 retained-claim). Owner direction at 13:48Z verbatim 'this session is complete, run a session handoff' + 13:52Z 'no gates' + 13:53Z 'multiple small closeout broadcasts please' — discharged. Secret Creeping Moth session 61d726 closed. — Secret / 61d726
